name: Salmon Burgers
recipeIngredient: 15 ½ oz Salmon; drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the salmon, eggs, 2/3 cup bread crumbs, scallions, lemon juice, and pepper until well-blended.
2. Shape into 4 patties, about ¾ inch thick; coat with remaining bread crumbs. Place patties on wax-paper-lined plate; chill for 1 hour.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add patties and cook 5 minutes per side until browned; drain on paper towels.
4. Serve with Yogurt-Cucumber Sauce. Makes 4 servings.
Yogurt-Cucumber Sauce
In a medium bowl, combine well ½ cup plain low-fat yogurt, ¼ cup chopped, pared cucumber, 1 tbsp fresh chopped dill, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Cover and chill for 30 minutes before using. Makes 1 cup.
